subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Join the Operations Trail team to fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
lesson.mini_lesson: Fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
lesson.objective: Fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies.
lesson.concept_explanation: Fluently multiply and divide within 100 using strategies. Use models, equations, and careful checking to explain each answer.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may choose an operation too quickly or miss how the model connects to the equation.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help solve classroom supplies, games, snacks, teams, and sharing situations.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the situation, build the model, write the equation, solve, and check with an inverse or another strategy.
hints: Read the problem and name what is known.
Use the model to connect numbers to an equation.
Check that the answer matches the question asked.

misconception_bank.fact_recall_gap: Learner may not know a fact yet and needs a strategy.
misconception_bank.inverse_fact_confusion: Learner may not connect related multiplication and division facts.
misconception_bank.skip_count_error: Learner may skip too far or too few times.
misconception_bank.multiplication_division_mixup: Learner may choose multiplication when division is asked or reverse the operation.

game_theme.title: Multiplication and Division Fluency

story.text: Listen to this page. This mission introduces multiplication and division fact fluency. Look for related facts and fact families in the picture. Think about how the mission story connects to the math. Use a known fact, then connect the inverse operation as you get ready. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This mini lesson teaches multiplication and division fact fluency. Look for related facts and fact families and read the vocabulary words. Use a known fact, then connect the inverse operation one step at a time. Watch out for guessing before checking which operation is being used. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This Watch page shows a worked example for Multiplication and Division Fluency. Look at the model and listen for how each part matches the question. Step one, read what is being asked. Step two, use the visual model. Step three, check the final answer with the right units or math words. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This guided demo lets you practice multiplication and division fact fluency with help. Look for related facts and fact families before you choose an answer. Use a known fact, then connect the inverse operation and explain your thinking in math words. Do not rush past guessing before checking which operation is being used. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Practice time. Use the model to help you work on multiplication and division fact fluency. Use a known fact, then connect the inverse operation and check your answer. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Choose your answer when you are ready.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: Challenge time. The problem may need careful thinking about multiplication and division fact fluency. Look for related facts and fact families, then decide which strategy fits best. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Answer carefully, then continue.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: Checkpoint time. Show what you know about multiplication and division fact fluency. Read the problem, use the visual, and check for guessing before checking which operation is being used. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Choose or write the answer when ready.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your work on Multiplication and Division Fluency. Look at your stars and remember the strategy you used. Mistakes helped your brain grow when you checked them. Press Next to see your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows how your mission went. Look at your accuracy, hints, and growth notes. If a level needs more practice, go back to the hub or continue to Skill Practice. Use your results to choose what to practice next.
profile.label: Read This Page
